ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the match took place */,
  "team_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score_a" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_b" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the match was held */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, playoff, friendly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_a_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_b_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team competes in */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's coach */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at matches */,
  "social_media_mentions" INTEGER /* Number of social media mentions */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement record */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., match, event, promotion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_engagement_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience coaching */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Shots taken by the player in the match */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Passes completed by the player in the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "founder" TEXT /* Founder of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Prize pool for the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_statistics" (
  "match_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match statistics record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "total_goals_a" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by team A */,
  "total_goals_b" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by team B */,
  "total_shots_a" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by team A */,
  "total_shots_b" INTEGER /* Total shots taken by team B */,
  "total_passes_a" INTEGER /* Total passes completed by team A */,
  "total_passes_b" INTEGER /* Total passes completed by team B */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the match */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from ticket sales */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the ticket sale */,
  "sale_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the ticket was sold (e.g., online, box office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fan_profiles" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "favorite_team" INTEGER /* ID of the fan's favorite team */,
  "favorite_player" INTEGER /* ID of the fan's favorite player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the fan */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the fan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_profiles_favorite_team FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fan_profiles_favorite_player FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_player") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (team or player) owning the account */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (team or player) */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram, Facebook) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (team or league) being sponsored */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (team or league) */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsors_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)
